LAW AND MOTION, 302, (AMENDED) PETITION UNDER CCP 1541 TO COLLECT PROCEEDS HELD BY STATE CONTROLLER, CONTROLLER'S ACCT NOS. 1015734, 1704617, 5073271 & 5073272, OFF CALENDAR PER MOVING PARTY.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PETITION FILED BY PETITIONER CAMPBELL, MAURICE J AS TO RESPONDENT STATE CONTROLLER OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-18-2002 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, (AMENDED) PETITION UNDER CCP 1541 TO COLLECT PROCEEDS HELD BY STATE CONTROLLER, CONTROLLER'S ACCT NOS. 1015734, 1704617, 5073271 & 5073272 CONTINUED FROM SEP-18-2002 TO LAW AND MOTION AT OCT-29-2002, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 . (NO OPPOSITION WAS FILED SINCE MOTION UNTIMELY AND RESPONDENT HAS 60 DAYS TO ANSWER UNDER CCP 1541). RESPONDENT TO FILE ANSWER BY 10/21; REPLY, IF ANY, DUE 10/24. MR. MORAZZINI TO PREPARE SCHEDULING ORDER. (AJR/JU), REPORTER: ERIC THRONE, CSR#7855

calendar.matters:
(Amended) Petition Under Ccp 1541 To Collect Proceeds Held By State Controller, Controller'S Acct Nos. 1015734, 1704617, 5073271 & 5073272
Off Calendar Oct-21-2002 Off Calendar

(Amended) Petition Under Ccp 1541 To Collect Proceeds Held By State Controller, Controller'S Acct Nos. 1015734, 1704617, 5073271 & 5073272
Off Calendar Sep-18-2002 Continued To Oct-29-02 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Maurice J. Campbell, Esq. 510/928-3142 petitioner & moving party in pro per; Zackery P. Morazzini, Deputy Atty General 916/445-8226 for respondent & opposing party.
RULING: The Court continues the matter to 10/29/02 (no opposition was filed since motion untimely and respondent has 60 days to answer under CCP 1541). Respondent to file answer by 10/21; reply, if any, due 10/24. Mr. Morazzini to prepare scheduling order. (AJR/ju)
